home.author: Susan Chesson
home.text: Josh was super efficient & communicative. Great service all around!

home.author: Justin
home.text: High Tide Soft Wash did a fantastic job power washing the house. He was courteous, respectful and timely. Would recommend anyone to reach out for a quote.

home.author: BL Collins
home.text: Our home sparkles like new! The customer walk around and review is a nice way to wrap up the job, excellent touch.

home.author: Jacob Kidd
home.text: They did a great job on my house and driveway! Great communication and timeliness all around. Would recommend to anyone and will have them come back!

home.author: Sandy Evangelista
home.text: I highly recommend High Tide Soft Wash to clean your home. Josh did a fantastic job getting rid of the pollen, mold, dirt and cobwebs from our home! It looks brand new! He is also excellent with communication and fit me in the schedule quickly.

home.author: Lara Witschen
home.text: Great owner, customer service, and work! We will definitely use him again!

home.author: Kristin Britt
home.text: Josh did a great job. Highly recommend!! Easy to schedule and quick to respond. Our house and patios look great!

home.author: James Foutty
home.text: Fast, efficient, great work at a great price. Would recommend and use again!

contact.author: MIKEY PARKS
contact.text: He showed up on time and went above and beyond getting my house and sidewalk and driveway cleaned and looking NEW !! highly recommend !!!!

contact.author: Justin
contact.text: High Tide Soft Wash did a fantastic job power washing the house. He was courteous, respectful and timely. Would recommend anyone to reach out for a quote.

contact.author: Jason Bolen
contact.text: Josh is a quality guy and does quality work. What more could you ask for!? Shows up on time, does an incredible job, and all at a respectable price. Our house has never looked better. Thank you High Tide Soft Wash!

contact.author: Justin Bridge
contact.text: Josh did a great job cleaning our home. He taped off doors, fixtures, and anything else he was worried about getting wet. He even went as far as to cover our porch shade on the back of the house to ensure it didn't discolor. Solid effort, fantastic job. Couldn't ask for anything beyond that. Would recommend!

contact.author: Dana Pawinski
contact.text: Josh was highly professional, on time, performed above expectations and even covered exterior electrical outlets for added protection. No more dirt, algae, or residue! Highly recommend their services!

contact.author: Traci Brown
contact.text: Very pleased !!!! You cant go wrong hiring High Tide ! Pressure washed our house & driveway and did an amazing job ! I cant complain at all and his price was on point

contact.author: Josh Richards
contact.text: Josh did an incredible job restoring our property to it's "new" condition with his pressure washing expertise! Absolutely recommend! Great work!

why-us.author: Mama Tried
why-us.text: Josh was absolutely amazing!!! Honest, Godly and a first responder to boot. He not only communicated with me every time I emailed a question or concern, but got my 86yo Mom's house and outbuilding white as snow, he then left to go to my Aunts & Uncles across Wilmington to give them a quote and started working the same day…can you find any better service?

why-us.author: MIKEY PARKS
why-us.text: He showed up on time and went above and beyond getting my house and sidewalk and driveway cleaned and looking NEW !! highly recommend !!!!

why-us.author: AyyECHO Official
why-us.text: Highly professional and extremely transparent. The guy who washed our house was extremely informative and made sure to explain what he was going to do as well as taking care to make sure all of our stuff outside was situated before he started with chemicals. He definitely paid attention to detail. Would definitely use again and have recommended him to family members already.

why-us.author: Justin Bridge
why-us.text: Josh did a great job cleaning our home. He taped off doors, fixtures, and anything else he was worried about getting wet. He even went as far as to cover our porch shade on the back of the house to ensure it didn't discolor. Solid effort, fantastic job. Couldn't ask for anything beyond that. Would recommend!

why-us.author: Dale Nixon
why-us.text: Highly recommend High Tide Soft Wash to all my neighbors. Josh, owner and operator of the business is professional, on time, focuses on work quality and complete customer satisfaction. Josh pre-wet and helped cover all my plants. Very personable and courteous. He was not satisfied with the quality of cleaning on a very small portion of my front porch floor and went back and rewashed it a second time of his own volition with no prompting by me. The quality of the complete house soft wash was excellent. Josh took great care of my property and I'll definitely call him again next year! Thank you Josh! Dale and Pat Nixon
